from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from governance.runners.managed_channel_consumer import validate_message

FIXTURES = [
    ("missing_payload", "governance/tests/fixtures/managed_channel_message_negative_missing_payload.json"),
    ("template_claims_release", "governance/tests/fixtures/managed_channel_message_negative_template_claims_release.json"),
]


def run():
    results = []
    for name, path in FIXTURES:
        message = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        ok, errors = validate_message(message)
        results.append({"test": name, "ok": ok is False and bool(errors), "errors": errors})
    return {"ok": all(item["ok"] for item in results), "release_pass": False, "results": results}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    result = run()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
